---
title: "Elinor Champernowne"
---

## Elinor Champernowne

**Dates:** (1846-1876)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

She was a Gosling until 1863, alias unknown.  She was the daughter of Henry Champernowne (1815-1851) of Dartington Hall, and Charlotte Buller. [LG 871, 1914 Champernowne]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
